creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 186719
Patch to update multimedia/audacious-gtk3

- Update to 3.9
- Adjust dependencies (remove dbus-glib), now it uses gdbus-codegen (from GLib20)
- Use GitHub host because tarball is not available on audacious-media-player.org site

Note: with portlint GITHUB macros needs to be placed after USES. For me it's totally wrong (not coherent with MASTER_SITES definition).
